title: glochidion zeylanicum var. nitidum
intro: Glochidion zeylanicum var. nitidum, also known as the glossy leafed Glochidion, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is a small, evergreen tree or shrub that is native to Sri Lanka and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and is also believed to have anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Glochidion zeylanicum var. nitidum typically involve the leaves and stems being dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
